hypothesis: If AI-guided multi-stage screening combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X compositional space, then novel silicon-based anode materials with theoretical capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable lithium-ion migration channels can be systematically identified and designed, because the geometric stability of Li⁺ transport channels upon lithiation/delithiation is a predictable structural property that constrains viable high-capacity anode candidates.
